source_description: Digital 法寶義林 (Hôbôgirin) TEI edition, based on the 1978 Répertoire du Canon bouddhique sino-japonais. Data under CC BY-SA.
extraction_note: The Hobogirin Repertoire does NOT contain systematic Taisho-to-Tohoku (Tibetan) cross-references. The tibetan_refs fields are empty. However, the Sanskrit titles and Nanjio numbers can be used for indirect matching against Tibetan catalogs. Tohoku numbers (Tt./Ttt.) appear only in biographical notes about translators and refer to biographical texts, not text parallels.

T0002.note:
SHICHIBUTSU KYŌ (Qi fo jing) 七佛經 *Mahāvadānasūtra 法天 fa3 tian1 S. XII 10;
                        卍 XV 4; Nj. 860; K. 1182. Cf. 1 (1), 2, 4, 125 (48, 4) 宋 64

T0003.note:
BIBASHIBUTSU KYŌ (Pi po she fo jing) 毘婆尸佛經 *Mahāvadānasūtra 法天 fa3 tian1
                        S. XII 10; 卍 XV 4; Nj. 850; K. 1177. Cf. 1 (1), 2, 4, 125 (48, 4) 宋 64

T0004.note:

T0005.note:

                        XII 10; 卍 VIII 10; Nj. 119; K. 654. *[Daihatsu]naiongyō, *Hōdōnaiongyō. Cf.

T0008.note:

T0009.note:

                        901; K. 1247. Cf. 1 (4) 宋 64

T0010.chinese_title: 白衣金幢二婆羅門縁起經

T0062.note:
SHINSAI KYŌ (Xin sui jing) 新歳經 Pravārañasūtra 卍 XV 2; Nj. 763; K. 872.

T0066.note:
MANYŌ RAN GYŌ (Mo rao luan jing) 魔嬈亂經 An. 25-220 S. XII 8; 卍 XIV 1; Nj.

T0069.note:
GOKOKU KYŌ (Hu guo jing) 護國經 Rāṣṭrapālanāṭaka 法賢 fa3 xian2 S. XII 8; 卍 XV

T0070.note:
SHU KYŌ (Shu jing) 數經 Hōko 法炬 fa3 ju4 S. XII 8; 卍 XIV 2; Nj. 596; K. 710.

r BONJI AMPARAEM MON SHU SON GYŌ (Fan zhi e bo luo yan wen zhong zun

T0072.note:
SANKI GOKAI JISHIṄ ENRI KUDOKU KYŌ (San gui wu jie ci xin yan li gong de
                        jing) 三歸五戎慈心厭離功徳經 An. 317-420 S. XII 8; 卍 XIV 2; Nj. 605; K. 700.

T0073.note:
SHUDATSU KYŌ (Xu da jing) 須達經 Gunabiji 求那毘地 qiu2 na3 pi2 di4

BOMMAYU KYŌ (Fan mo yu jing) 梵摩渝經 Shi Ken 支謙. S. XII 8; 卍 XIV 2; Nj. 608;

r SONJŌ KYŌ (Zun shang jing) 尊上經 Jiku Hōgo 竺法護 zhu2 fa3 hu4

T0080.chinese_title: 佛爲首伽長者説業報差別經
T0080.japanese_title: BUTSU I SHUKACHŌJA SETSU GŌHŌ SABETSU KYŌ
T0080.note:
BUTSU I SHUKACHŌJA SETSU GŌHŌ SABETSU KYŌ (Fo wei shou jia zhang zhe shuo
                        ye bao cha bie jing) 佛爲首伽長者説業報差別經 Śukasūtra 瞿曇法智 qu2 tan2 fa3 zhi4 (Gautama
                        Dharmaprajña). S. XIV 6; 卍 XV 1; Nj. 739; K. 805. *Gōhōshabetsukyō. Cf. 26

FUMBETSU ZENNAKU HŌŌ KYŌ (Fen bie shan e bao ying jing) 分別善惡報應經 Śukasūtra

T0082.note:
I KYŌ (Yi jing) 意經 Jiku Hōgo 竺法護 zhu2 fa3 hu4 (Dharmarakṣa). S. XII 8; 卍

T0083.note:
ŌHŌ KYŌ (Ying fa jing) 應法經 Jiku Hōgo 竺法護 zhu2 fa3 hu4 (Dharmarakṣa). S.

SAI KYŌ (Zhai jing) 齋經 Shi Ken 支謙. S. XII 8; 卍 XIV 1; Nj. 577; K. 721.

                        XIV 10; Nj. 701; K. 823. Cf. 26 (202), 87, 88 劉宋 36

                        luo2 (Guˆabhadra). S. XII 8; 卍 XIV 1; Nj. 581; K. 697. Cf. 26 (209) 劉宋 34

T0091.chinese_title: 婆羅門子命終愛念不離經

SEṄ YU KYŌ (Jian yu jing) 箭喩經 An. 317-420 S. XII 8; 卍 XIV 1; Nj. 585; K.

ZŌAGON GYŌ (Za a han jing) 雜阿含經 Saṃyuktāgama 求那跋陀羅 qiu2 na3 ba2 tuo2 luo2
                        (Guˆabahadra). S. XIII 2-4; 卍 XIII 5-7; Nj. 544; Kyik., agon bu I-III; K.

T0101.note:
ZŌAGON GYŌ (Za a han jing) 雜阿含經 Saṃyuktāgama 22-280 S. XIII 6; 卍 XII 10;

SHŌ BŌIN GYŌ (Sheng fa ying jing) 聖法印經 Jiku Hōgo 竺法護 zhu2 fa3 hu4

ASOKUDATSU KYŌ (A chi da jing) 阿遬達經 Gunabatsudara 求那跋陀羅 qiu2 na3 ba2 tuo2

GYOKUYANYO KYŌ (Yu ye nü jing) 玉耶女經 An. 265-316 S. XII 4; 卍 XIV 2; Nj.

T0143.note:
GYOKUYA KYŌ (Yu ye jing) 玉耶經 Jiku Dommuran 竺曇無蘭. S. XII 4; 卍 XIV 2; Nj.

T0145.note:
BUTSUMO HATSUNAION GYŌ (Fo mu ban ni yuan jing) 佛母般泥洹經 Ekan 慧簡 hui4 jian3

T0146.note:
SHAEKOKUŌ MUKEN JŪJI KYŌ (She wei guo wang meng jian shi shi jing)

                        *Mukenjūjikyō, *Mukemōkyō. Cf. 125 (52, 9), 147, 148 34

T0147.note:
SHAEKOKUŌ JŪMU KYŌ (She wei guo wang shi meng jing) 舍衞國王十夢經 An. 265-316

T0148.note:
KOKUŌFURISENNAI JŪMU KYŌ (Guo wang bu li xian ni shi meng jing) 國王不黎先泥十夢經

ANAN DŌGAKU KYŌ (A nan tong xue jing) 阿難同學經 An Seikō 安世高. S. XIV 8; 卍 XIV

T0150a.note:
SHICHISHO SANKAN GYŌ (Qi chu san guan jing) 七處三觀經 An Seikō 安世高. S. XIII

T0150b.note:

T0151.note:
AGON SHŌGYŌ KYŌ (A han zheng xing jing) 阿含正行經 An Seikō 安世高. S. XIV 8; 卍

T0153.note:
BOSATSU HONNEN GYŌ (Pu sa ben yuan jing) 菩薩本縁經 Bodhisattvāvadāna? 僧伽斯那

                        Kyik., honnen-bu VIII; K. 988. *Shinashosenhonnengyō, *Bosatsuhonnenjikkyō.

T0154.note:
SHŌ KYŌ (Sheng jing) 生經 Jātaka? 竺法護 zhu2 fa3 hu4 (Dharmarakṣa). S. XIV 5;

T0155.note:
BOSATSU HONGYŌ KYŌ (Pu sa ben xing jing) 菩薩本行經 Bidhisattvapūrvacarya? 卍

T0156.note:
DAIHŌBEM BUTSU HŌON GYŌ (Da fang bian fo bao en jing) 大方便佛報恩經 An. 25-220

T0281.note:

                        2; Nj. 100; Kyik., kegon-bu IV; K. 94. *[Kegongyō]jōgyōhon, *Hongōkyō. Cf.
                        278 (7 & 11), 279 (11 & 15), 282 吳 13

T0282.note:
r SHOBOSATSU GUBUTSU HONGŌ KYŌ (Zhu pu sa qiu fo ben ye jing) 諸菩薩求佛本業經
                        Nyō Dōshin 聶道眞. S. I 10; 卍 VIII 4; Nj. 107; K. 93.
                        *[Bosatsu]gubutsuhongōkyō. Cf. 278 (7), 279 (11), 281 西晉 13

T0283.note:
r BOSATSU JŪJŪ GYŌDŌ HON (Pu sa shi zhu xing dao pin) 菩薩十住行道品
                        Daśavyavasthāna 竺法護 zhu2 fa3 hu4 (Dharmarakṣa). S. I 10; 卍 VIII 4; Nj. 108;
                        K. 92. *Jūjūgyōdōhongyō, *Bosatsujūjūkyō. Cf. 278 (11), 279 (15), 281 (2),
                        284 西晉 13

T0284.note:
BOSATSU JŪJŪ KYŌ (Pu sa shi zhu jing) 菩薩十住經 Gitamitsu 祇多蜜 qi2 duo1 mi4
                        (Gītanutra), S. I 10; 卍 VIII 4; Nj. 109; K. 97. *Kegonjūjūhon, *Jūjūkyō. Cf.
                        278 (11), 279 (15), 281 (2), 283 東晉 13

T0285.note:
ZEMBI ISSAICHI TOKU KYŌ (Jian bei yi qie zhi de jing) 漸備一切智徳經
                        *Daśabhūmikasūtra 竺法護 zhu2 fa3 hu4 (Dharmarakṣa). S. I 10; 卍 VIII 4; Nj.
                        110; K. 89. *Jūjūkyō, *Dai[chi]ekōsammaikyō. Cf. 278 (22), 279 (26), 286,
                        287, 1521, 1522 西晉 13

T0286.note:
JŪJŪ KYŌ (Shi zhu jing) 十住經 *Daśabhūmikasūtra 鳩摩羅什 jiu1 mo2 luo2 shi2
                        (Kumārajīva). S. I 10; 卍 VIII 3; Nj. 105; K. 98. Cf. 278 (22), 279 (26),
                        285, 287, 1521, 1522 姚秦 13

T0287.note:
JŪJI KYŌ (Shi di jing) 十地經 *Daśabhūmikasūtra 尸羅逹摩 (Śīladharma). S. XXV 8;
                        Z. I II 4; K. 1388. Cf. 278 (22), 279 (26), 285, 286, 1521, 1522 唐 66

T0288.note:
TŌMOKUBOSATSU SHOMON SAMMAI KYŌ (Deng mu pu sa suo wen san mei jing)
                        等目菩薩所問三昧經 Jiku Hōgo 竺法護 zhu2 fa3 hu4 (Dharmarakṣa). S. I 10; 卍 VIII 4; Nj.
                        111; K. 100. *Tōmokubosatsushomongyō, *Tōmokubosatsukyō,
                        *Fugembosatsujōikyō. Cf. 279 (27) 西晉 13

T0289.note:

                        VIII 2; Nj. 95; K. 101. *Kegongyōjuryōhon, *Kemmuhembutsudokyō. Cf. 278
                        (26), 279 (31), 290 唐 13

T0290.note:
KYŌRYŌ ISSAI BUSSETSU KUDOKU KYŌ (Jiao liang yi qie fo cha gong de jing)
                        較量一切佛刹功徳經 ±Āryatathāgatānāṃbuddhakṣetraguñoktadharmaparyāya 法賢 fa3 xian2 S.

                        (31), 289 宋 64

T0291.note:
NYORAI KŌKEN GYŌ (Ru lai xing xian jing) 如來興顯經
                        Tathāgatotpattisambhavanirdeśa 竺法護 zhu2 fa3 hu4 (Dharmarakṣa). S. I 10; 卍
                        VIII 2; Nj. 92; K. 99. *Kōken[nyogen]gyō. Cf. 278 (32), 279 (37) 西晉 13

T0292.note:
DOSE HON GYŌ (Du shi pin jing) 度世品經 Jiku Hōgo 竺法護 zhu2 fa3 hu4
                        (Dharmarakṣa). S. I 10; 卍 VIII 3; Nj. 104; K. 103. *Dosekyō. Cf. 278 (33),
                        279 (38) 西晉 13

T0293.note:
DAIHŌKŌBUTSU KEGON GYŌ (Da fang guang fo hua yan jing) 大方廣佛華嚴經 Hannya 般若
                        bo1 ruo4 (Prājña). S. I 5-6; 卍 VII 10-VIII 1; Nj. 89; K. 1262, K.S. 16, K.S.
                        52. *Kegongyō, *Shijūkegon,
                        *Daihōkōbutsukegongyō[nyūfushigigedatsukyōgai]fugengyōgambon. I-XXXIX, Cf.
                        278 (34), 279 (39); XL, Cf. 278 (31), 279 (36), 294-297, 2206b. 唐 66

T0295.chinese_title: 大方廣佛華嚴經入法界品
T0295.note:
DAIHŌKŌBUTSU KEGONGYŌ NYŪHOKKAIBON (Da fang guang fo hua yan jing ru fa
                        jie pin) 大方廣佛華嚴經入法界品 *Gañḍavyūha 地婆訶羅 di4 po2 he1 luo2 (Divākara). S. I 11;
                        卍 VIII 3; Nj. 101; K. 104. *Kegongyōnyūhokkaibon,
                        *[Daihōkōbutsukegongyō]zokunyūhokkaibon. Cf. 278 (34), 279 (39), 293, 294 唐
                        13

                        *Bhadracarīprañidhāna 佛駄跋陀羅 (Buddhabhadra). S. I 11; 卍 XXVI 6; Nj. 1336; K.
                        1029. *Monjushirihotsugangekyō. Cf. 297, 293 (40), 278 (31), 279 (36) 東晉 52

T0297.note:
FUGEMBOSATSU GYŌGAN SAN (Pu xian pu sa xing yuan zan) 普賢菩薩行願讚
                        *Samantabhadracaryāprañidhānarāja 不空 bu4 kong1 (Amoghavajra). S. XXV 15; 卍
                        XIX 7; Nj. 1142; K. 1282. Cf. 296, 293 (40), 278 (31), 279 (36), 1167 唐 65

T0298.note:
DAIHŌKŌ FUGEN SHOSETSU KYŌ (Da fang guang pu xian suo shuo jing) 大方廣普賢所説經
                        Jisshananda 實叉難陀 shi2 cha1 nan2 tuo2 (Śikṣānanda). S. I 11; 卍 VIII 2; Nj.
                        98; K. 91. *Fugenshosetsukyō. 唐 13

T0299.note:
DAIHŌKŌ SŌJI HŌKŌMYŌ KYŌ (Da fang guang zong chi bao guang ming jing)
                        大方廣總持寶光明經 Ratnolkādhārañī 法天 fa3 tian1 S. I 11; 卍 XV 2; Nj. 785; K. 1095.
                        *Sōjihōkōmyōkyō. 宋 63

T0302.note:

                        1525 (42) MIROKUBOSATSU SHOMOṄ E (Mi le pu sa suo wen hui) 彌勤菩薩所問會
                        ±Maitreyaparipṛcchā 菩提流志 pu2 ti2 liu2 zhi4 (Bodhiruci). Cf. 349 (43)
                        FUMYŌBOSATSU E (Pu ming pu sa hui) 普明菩薩會 *Kāśyapaparivarta (44) HŌRYŌJU E
                        (Bao liang ju hui) 寶梁聚會 Ratnarāśi 道龔 *Hōryōkyō. (45) MUJIṄEBOSATSU E (Wu jin
                        hui pu sa hui) 無盡慧菩薩會 ±Akṣayamatiparipṛcchā 菩提流志 pu2 ti2 liu2 zhi4
                        (Bodhiruci) (46) MONJU SETSU HANNYA E (Wen shu shuo ban ruo hui) 文殊説般若會
                        ±Saptaśatikānāmaprajñāpāramitā 曼陀羅仙 man4 tuo2 luo2 xian1
                        *Monjushirishosetsumakahannyaharamitsukyō. Cf. 220 (7), 232, 233 (47)
                        HŌKEIBOSATSU E (Bao ji pu sa hui) 寶髻菩薩會 ±Ratnacūḍaparipṛcchā 竺法護 zhu2 fa3
                        hu4 (Dharmarakṣa). *Hōkeibosatsushomongyō. (48) SHŌMANFUJIṄ E (Sheng man fu
                        ren hui) 勝鬘夫人會 ±Śrīmālādevīsiṃhanāda 菩提流志 pu2 ti2 liu2 zhi4 (Bodhiruci). Cf.
                        353 (49) KŌBAKUSENNIṄ E (Guang bo xian ren hui) 廣博仙人會 ±‰ṣivyāsaparipṛcchā
                        菩提流志 pu2 ti2 liu2 zhi4 (Bodhiruci). Cf. 354 唐 8

DAIHŌKŌ SANKAI KYŌ (Da fang guang san jie jing) 大方廣三戒經 ±Trisaṃvaranirdeśa

                        seng1 jia1 po2 luo2 (Saṃghabhara?). S. II 8; 卍 VI 3; Nj. 29; K. 28.

                        hu4 (Dharmarakṣa). S. II 8; 卍 VI 3; Nj. 30; K. 29. *Fumongyō. Cf. 310 (10)

HOKKAKU JŌSHIN GYŌ (Fa jue jing shen xin jing) 發覺淨身心經 ±Adhyāśayasaṃcodana

SHURAI KYŌ (Xu lai jing) 須頼經 Sūrataparipṛcchā 卍 VI 4; Nj. 43. Cf. 310
                        (27), 329 曹魏 20

T0329.note:
SHURAI KYŌ (Xu lai jing) 須頼經 Sūrataparipṛcchā 卍 VI 4; Nj. 44; K. 362. Cf.
                        310 (27), 328 前涼 20

SHUMADAIBOSATSU KYŌ (Xu mo ti pu sa jing) 須摩提菩薩經 ±Sumatidārikāparipṛcchā

                        ±Bhadrapālaśreṣṭhiparipṛcchā 地婆訶羅 di4 po2 he1 luo2 (Divākara). S. II 12; 卍

                        VI 5; Nj. 57; K. 52. *Kohoṇinichisetsuhannyakyō, *Makaenhōgongyō. Cf. 310

                        she2 na3 jue2 duo1 (Jñānagupta). S. II 12; 卍 VI 5; Nj. 51; K. 241.

T0357.note:

                        jia1 po2 luo2 (Saṃghabara?). S. V 3; 卍 VI 5; Nj. 56; K. 189.

                        zhi guang ming zhuang yan jing) 大乘入諸佛境界智光明莊嚴經

                        *Nyūshobutsukyōgaishōgongyō. Cf. 357, 358 宋 69

T0360.note:
MURYŌJU KYŌ (Wu liang shou jing) 無量壽經 *Sukhāvatīvyūha; ±Amitābhavyūha;
                        A[pari]mitāyu˙sūtra? Kō Sōgai kang1 seng1 kai3 (Saṃghavarman) ? S. II 8; 卍
                        VI 3; Nj. 27; Kyik., hōshaku-bu VII; K. 26. *Dai[muryōju]kyō. Cf. 310 (5),
                        361-364, 1745-1748, 1524, 2759, 2207 曹魏 9

T0361.note:

T0362.chinese_title: 阿彌陀三耶三佛薩樓佛檀過度人道經
T0362.japanese_title: r AMIDA SAṄYASAMBUTSU SARUBUTSUDAN KADONINDŌ KYŌ
T0362.note:
r AMIDA SAṄYASAMBUTSU SARUBUTSUDAN KADONINDŌ KYŌ (A mi tuo san ye san fo
                        sa lou fo tan guo du ren dao jing) 阿彌陀三耶三佛薩樓佛檀過度人道經 *Sukhāvatīvyūha;
                        ±Amitābhavyūha; A[pari]mitāyu˙sūtra? Shi Ken 支謙 zhi1 qian1 (?). S. II 8; 卍
                        VI 3; Nj. 26; K. 25. *Daiamidakyō, *Kadonindōkyō. Cf. 310 (5), 360, 361,
                        363, 364, 1524 吳 9

T0363.note:
DAIJŌ MURYŌJU SHŌGON GYŌ (Da cheng wu liang shou zhuang yan jing)

                        II 8; 卍 XV 5; Nj. 863; K. 1199. *[Muryōju]shōgongyō. Cf. 310 (5), 360-362,
                        364, 1524 宋 64

T0364.note:
DAI AMIDA KYŌ (Da a mi tuo jing) 大阿彌陀經 *Sukhāvatīvyūha 卍 X 5; Nj. 203.
                        Cf. 310 (5), 360-363 宋 18

T0365.note:
KAM MURYŌJUBUTSU KYŌ (Guan wu liang shou fo jing) 觀無量壽佛經
                        Amitāyurbuddhānusmṛtisūtra? O良耶舍 (Kālayaśas). S. II 12; 卍 X 4; Nj. 198;
                        Kyik., hōshaku-bu VII; K. 191. *Muryōju[butsu]kangyō, *Kangyō,
                        *Kammuryōjukyō. Aprocryphe? Cf. 1749-1754, 2760, 2207 劉宋 18

T0366.note:
AMIDA KYŌ (A mi tuo jing) 阿彌陀經 Sukhāvatī[amṛta]vyūha 鳩摩羅什 jiu1 mo2 luo2
                        shi2 (Kumārajīva). S. II 12; 卍 X 4; Nj. 200; Kyik., hōshaku-bu VII; K. 192,
                        K.S. 6, K.S. 51, K.S. 58. *Muryōjukyō, *Shō[amida]kyō. Cf. 367, 1755-1762,
                        2207-2210 姚秦 18

T0367.note:
SHŌSAN JŌDO BUTSU SHŌJU KYŌ (Cheng zan jing tu fo she shou jing) 稱讚淨土佛攝受經
                        Sukhāvatī[amṛta]vyūha 玄奘 xuan2 zang4 S. II 12; 卍 X 4; Nj. 199; K. 193.
                        *Shōsanjōdokyō. Cf. 366 唐 18

T0368.chinese_title: 抜一切業障根本得生淨土神呪
T0368.note:
r BATSUISSAIGOSSHŌ KOMPON TOKUSHŌJŌDO SHINJU (Ba yi qie ye zhang gen ben
                        de sheng jing tu shen zhou) 抜一切業障根本得生淨土神呪 Gunabatsudara 求那跋陀羅 qiu2 na3 ba2
                        tuo2 luo2 (Guˆabhadra). S. II 12; 卍 X 4; Nj. 201; Kyik., hōshaku-bu VII.
                        *Tokushōjōdoshinju. 劉宋 19

                        An. 590-618

                        ±Aparamitaguñānuśaṃsādhārañī Z. I I 1

                        485; Kyik., hōshaku-bu VII; K. 443. *Kuonjōōkyō. 24

                        *Kanzeombosatsutokudaiseishibosatsujukikyō. Cf. 372 宋 20

                        jing) 如幻三摩地無量印法門經 ±Māyopamasamādhisūtra 卍 XV 10; Nj. 977; K. 1450.
                        *Muryōinhōmongyō. Cf. 371 宋 67

                        18

DAI HATSUNEHAN GYŌ (Da ban nie pan jing) 大般涅槃經 *Mahāparinirvāñasūtra 曇無讖
                        tan2 wu2 chen4 S. XI 5-6; 卍 VIII 5-6; Nj. 113; Kyik., nehan-bu I-II; K. 105.

T0375.note:
DAI HATSUNEHAN GYŌ (Da ban nie pan jing) 大般涅槃經 *Mahāparinirvāñasūtra 卍
                        VIII 7-8; Nj. 114; K. 1403. Tradition dite du Sud, *[Nampon]nehangyō. Cf.

DAI HATSUNAION GYŌ (Da ban ni huan jing) 大般泥洹經 *Mahāparinirvāñasūtra 卍
                        VIII 10; Nj. 118; K. 106. *Naiongyō. Cf. 374 (1-6), 375 (1-18), 1527 東晉 15

T0377.note:
DAIHATSUNEHANGYŌ GOBUN (Da ban nie pan jing hou fen) 大般涅槃經後分

                        VIII 9; Nj. 115; K. 107. *[Nehangyō]gobun, *Jaibun,
                        *Daihatsunehangyōgodabibun. 唐 15

T0379.note:
SHIDŌJI SAMMAI KYŌ (Si tong zi san mei jing) 四童子三昧經
                        ±Caturdārakasamādhisūtra 闍那崛多 she2 na3 jue2 duo1 (Jñānagupta). S. XI 9; 卍
                        VIII 10; Nj. 121; K. 109. *Shidōjikyō. Cf. 378 隋 15

T0380.note:
DAIHI KYŌ (Da bei jing) 大悲經 ±Mahākaruñāpuñḍarīkasūtra 那連提耶舍 na3 lian2 ti2
                        ye1 she4 (Narendrayaśas). S. XI 9; 卍 VIII 9; Nj. 117; K. 110 高齊 15

T0381.note:
TŌJU SHUTOKU SAMMAI KYŌ (Deng ji zhong de san mei jing) 等集衆徳三昧經

                        IX 1; Nj. 128; K. 140. *Tōshūshutokukyō, *Shūssaifukutokusammaikyō. Cf. 382

T0383.note:

                        373. *Butsushōtōriteṇimoseppōkyō, *Mayakyō. 蕭齊 20

T0384.note:

                        XI 10; 卍 XII 1; Nj. 433; K. 406. *[Bosatsu]shotaikyō, *Taikyō. 姚秦 22

                        ye1 she4 (Narendrayaśas). S. XI 10; 卍 XII 5; Nj. 465; K. 420 隋 23

                        XIII 10; 卍 VIII 10; Nj. 122; Kyik., kyōjū-bu III; K. 453, K.S. 50.

                        6) MUGONBOSATSU HON (Wu yan pu sa pin) 無言菩薩品 Dommusen 曇無讖 tan2 wu2 chen4 Cf.

                        (10) KOKŪMOKU BUN (Xu kong mu wen) 虚空目分 Dommusen 曇無讖 tan2 wu2 chen4 (11)
                        HŌKEIBOSATSU HON (Bao ji pu sa pin) 寶髻菩薩品 Dommusen 曇無讖 tan2 wu2 chen4 (12)
                        MUJINIBOSATSU HON (Wu jin yi pu sa pin) 無盡意菩薩品 ±Akṣayamatinirdeśa K. 71.
                        *Mujinibosatsukyō. Cf. 403 (13) NICHIMITSU BUN (Ri mi wen) 日密分
                        ±Sūryagarbhavaipulyasūtra 曇無讖 tan2 wu2 chen4 Cf. 397 (14) (14) NICHIZŌ BUN
                        (Ri zang wen) 日藏分 ±Sūryagarbhavaipulyasūtra 那連提耶舍 na3 lian2 ti2 ye1 she4
                        (Narendrayaśas). *Daijōdaihōdōnichizōkyō. Cf. 397 (13) (15) GACHIZŌ BUN (Yue
                        zang wen) 月藏分 Candragarbhavaipulyasūtra? 那連提耶舍 na3 lian2 ti2 ye1 she4
                        (Narendrayaśas). *Daihōdōdaishūgachizōkyō. (16) SUMIZŌ BUN (Xu mi zang wen)
                        須彌藏分 ±Tathāgataśrīsamaya 那連提耶舍 na3 lian2 ti2 ye1 she4 (Narendrayaśas). Nj.
                        66; K. 59. *Daijōdaishūkyōdaishūsumizōkyō. (17) JIPPŌBOSATSU BON (Shi fang
                        pu sa pin) 十方菩薩品 Narendaiyasha 那連提耶舍 na3 lian2 ti2 ye1 she4 (Narendrayaśas).

                        (Dharmarakṣa). S. III 5; 卍 VII 1; Nj. 79; K. 72. *Nyoraidaiaikyō. Cf. 397

KAN KOKŪZŌBOSATSU KYŌ (Guan xu kong zang pu sa jing) 觀虚空藏菩薩經 Dommamitta

T0410.note:
DAIHŌKŌ JŪRIN KYŌ (Da fang guang shi lun jing) 大方廣十輪經
                        ±Daśacakrakṣitigarbha 412-439 S. III 7; 卍 VI 9; Nj. 65; K. 58. *Jūringyō.
                        Cf. 411 11

T0411.note:
DAIJŌ DAISHŪ JIZŌ JŪRIN GYŌ (Da cheng da ji di zang shi lun jing)
                        大乘大集地藏十輪經 ±Daśacakrakṣitigarbha 玄奘 xuan2 zang4 S. III 7; 卍 VI 9; Nj. 64; K.
                        57. *Jizōjūringyō. Cf. 410 唐 11

T0412.note:
JIZŌBOSATSU HONGAN GYŌ (Di zang pu sa ben yuan jing) 地藏菩薩本願經

                        10; 卍 XVI 1; Nj. 1003; Kyik., daijū-bu V. *Jizōhongangyō. 唐 52

T0413.note:

                        jing di zang pu sa qing wen fa shen zan) 百千頌大集經地藏菩薩請問法身讚 Fukū 不空 bu4 kong1

BOSATSU NEMBUTSUSAMMAI KYŌ (Pu sa nian fo san mei jing) 菩薩念佛三昧經

T0415.chinese_title: 大方等大集經菩薩念佛三昧分
T0415.note:
DAIHŌDŌ DAIJIKKYŌ BOSATSU NEMBUTSUSAMMAI BUN (Da fang deng da ji jing pu
                        sa nian fo san mei fen) 大方等大集經菩薩念佛三昧分
                        [Mahāvaipulyamahāsaṃnipāta]bodhisattvabuddhānusmṛtisamādhi? 逹磨笈多
                        (Dharmagupta). S. III 8; 卍 VI 10; Nj. 72; Kyik., daijū-bu VI; K. 65.
                        *Daihōdōdaishūbosatsunembutsusammaikyō, *Daijikkyōbosatsunembutsusammaibun.
                        隋 11

T0416.note:

                        大方等大集經賢護分 Bhadrapālasūtra; ±Pratyutpannabuddhasaṃmukhāvasthitasamādhisūtra.
                        Janakutta 闍那崛多 she2 na3 jue2 duo1 (Jñānagupta). S. III 9; 卍 VII 1; Nj. 75;
                        K. 66. *[Daihōdōdaishū]kengokyō, *Daijikkyōkengobun. Cf. 417-419 隋 11

T0420.note:
JIZAIŌBOSATSU KYŌ (Zi zai wang pu sa jing) 自在王菩薩經

                        VII 2; Nj. 82; K. 75. *Jizaiōkyō. Cf. 421 姚秦 11

                        瞿曇般若流支 qu2 tan2 ban1 zang4 liu2 zhi1 (Gautama Prajñāruci). S. III 9; 卍 VII
                        2; Nj. 83; K. 76. *Funjinnōkyō. Cf. 420 元魏 11

T0422.note:
DAISHŪ HIYUŌ KYŌ (Da ji pi yu wang jing) 大集譬喩王經 Janakutta 闍那崛多 she2 na3

                        Saṃghātidharmaparyāyasūtra 施護 shi1 hu4 S. III 9; 卍 XV 9; Nj. 972; Kyik.,
                        daijū-bu VI; K. 1412. *Eshōbōkyō. Cf. 423 宋 67

KENGŌ KYŌ (Xian jie jing) 賢刧經 Bhadrakalpikasūtra, Bhadrakalpāvadāna. Jiku

T0426.note:
SEMBUTSU INNEN GYŌ (Qian fo yin yuan jing) 千佛因縁經 Kumarajū 鳩摩羅什 jiu1 mo2
                        luo2 shi2 (Kumārajīva). S. IV 3; 卍 XII 6; Nj. 511; Kyik., kyōjū-bu XII; K.
                        452 後秦 24

T0427.note:
r HACHI KICHIJŌSHINJU KYŌ (Ba ji xiang shen zhou jing) 八吉祥神呪經
                        ±Aṣṭabuddhaka 卍 X 7; Nj. 299; K. 271. *Kichijōkyō. Cf. 428-431 吳 19

T0428.note:
r HACHI YŌSHINJU KYŌ (Ba yang shen zhou jing) 八陽神呪經 ±Aṣṭabuddhaka 竺法護
                        zhu2 fa3 hu4 (Dharmarakṣa). S. IV 4; 卍 X 7; Nj. 300; K. 276. *Hachiyōkyō.
                        Cf. 427, 429-431 西晉 19

T0429.note:
HACHIBU BUTSUMYŌ KYŌ (Ba bu fo ming jing) 八部佛名經 ±Maṇgalāṣṭaka 瞿曇般若流支 qu2

                        493. *Hachibutsukyō. Cf. 427, 428, 430, 431 元魏 24

T0430.note:
HACHI KICHIJŌ KYŌ (Ba ji xiang jing) 八吉祥經 ±Aṣṭabuddhaka [?]. Sōgyabara
                        僧伽羅 (Saṃghabhara?). S. IV 4; 卍 X 7; Nj. 301; K. 286. Cf. 427-429, 431 梁 19

T0431.note:

                        Janakutta 闍那崛多 she2 na3 jue2 duo1 (Jñānagupta). S. IV 4; 卍 X 7; Nj. 302; K.
                        282. Cf. 427-430 隋 19

T0432.note:
JŪ KICHIJŌ KYŌ (Shi ji xiang jing) 十吉祥經 An. 350-431 S. IV 4; 卍 XI 7; Nj.
                        418; K. 508 24

T0433.note:
HŌMŌ KYŌ (Bao wang jing) 寶網經 ±Ratnajālīparipṛcchā 竺法護 zhu2 fa3 hu4
                        (Dharmarakṣa). S. IV 4; 卍 XI 4; Nj. 385; Kyik., kyōjū-bu XII; K. 354.
                        *Hōmōdōjikyō. 西晉 20

T0434.note:
SHŌYŌ SHOBUTSU KUDOKU KYŌ (Cheng yang zhu fo gong de jing) 稱揚諸佛功徳經
                        ±Kusumasaṃcayasūtra 吉迦夜 ji2 jia1 ye4 (Kiṃkārya?). S. IV 4; 卍 XI 5; Nj. 402;

T0435.note:
r METSU JUPPŌ MYŌ KYŌ (Mie shi fang ming jing) 滅十方冥經
                        ±Daśadigandhakāravidhvaṃsanasūtra 竺法護 zhu2 fa3 hu4 (Dharmarakṣa). S. IV 4; 卍
                        XII 6; Nj. 515; K. 464. *Jippōmyōkyō. 西晉 24

                        528; K. 484. *Shichibutsumyōgōkudokukyō. 唐 24

T0438.note:
DAIJŌ DAIHŌKŌBUTSU KAN GYŌ (Da cheng da fang guang fo guan jing) 大乘大方廣佛冠經

T0439.note:
SHOBUTSU KYŌ (Zhu fo jing) 諸佛經 Sego 施護 shi1 hu4 S. XIII 10; 卍 XV 5; Nj.

T0440.note:
BUTSUMYŌ KYŌ (Fo ming jing) 佛名經 Bodairushi 菩提流支 pu2 ti2 liu2 zhi1

T0441.note:
BUTSUMYŌ KYŌ (Fo ming jing) 佛名經 An. 502-557 S. IV 2; Z. I I 1-3; K. 1404.

T0442.note:
JIPPŌ SENGOHYAKU BUTSUMYŌ KYŌ (Shi fang qian wu bai fo ming jing)
                        十方千五百佛名經 An. TH. Coll. Nakamura.

GOSENGOHYAKUBUTSUMYŌ SHINJU JOSHŌ METSUZAI KYŌ (Wu qian wu bai fo ming

                        22

MIROKU GESHŌ JŌBUTSU KYŌ (Mi le xia sheng cheng fo jing) 彌勒下生成佛經

T0455.note:
MIROKU GESHŌ JŌBUTSU KYŌ (Mi le xia sheng cheng fo jing) 彌勒下生成佛經
                        Maitreyavyākaraña? 卍 X 5; Nj. 207; K. 199. Cf. 453, 454 唐 18

                        195. *Mirokujōbutsukyō, *Daijōbutsukyō. 姚秦 18

DAIJŌ GAYA SANCHŌ KYŌ (Da cheng qie ye shan ding jing) 大乘伽耶山頂經 ±Gayāśīrṣa

MONJUSHIRI MON GYŌ (Wen shu shi li wen jing) 文殊師利問經 Mañjuśrīparipṛcchā?

                        1309. *Jimohon. Cf. 468 (14) 唐 65

DAIHŌDŌ CHŌŌ KYŌ (Da fang deng ding wang jing) 大方等頂王經

T0478.note:
DAIJŌ CHŌŌ KYŌ (Da cheng ding wang jing) 大乘頂王經
                        Mahāvaipulyamūrdharājasūtra? 月婆首那 yue4 po2 shou3 na3 (Ūrdhvaśūnya?). S. IV

T0479.note:

                        菩提流志 pu2 ti2 liu2 zhi4 (Bodhiruci). S. XXVII 5; 卍 XII 8; Nj. 535; K. 422.

T1007.note:
MURI MANDARA JU KYŌ (Mou li man tuo luo zhou jing) 牟梨曼陀羅呪經

BODAIJŌ SHŌGON DARANI KYŌ (Pu ti chang zhuang yan tuo luo ni jing)
                        菩提場莊嚴陀羅尼經 Fukū 不空 bu4 kong1 (Amoghavajra). S. XXV 8; 卍 XVI 5; Nj. 1025; K.
                        1299. *Bodaijōshōgongyō, *Bodaidaranikyō. 唐 65

                        *Anantamukha[sādhaka]dhārañī 支謙 zhi1 qian1 S. XXVII 9; 卍 XI 1; Nj. 355; K.
                        324. *Jōdōgōmatokuissaichikyō, *Mimitsujikyō. Cf. 1009, 1012-1018 吳 20

T1012.note:
SHUSSHŌ MURYŌMON JI KYŌ (Chu sheng wu liang men chi jing) 出生無量門持經
                        *Anantamukha[sādhaka]dhārañī 佛陀跋陀羅 fo2 tuo2 ba2 tuo2 luo2 (Buddhabhadra). S.
                        XXVII 9; 卍 XI 1; Nj. 356; K. 325. *Muryōmonjikyō, *Shimmimitsujikyō. Cf.
                        1009, 1011, 1013-1018 東晉 20

                        *Muryōmonhamakyō. Cf. 1009, 1011-1013, 1015-1018 劉宋 20

SHARIHOTSU DARANI KYŌ (She li fu tuo luo ni jing) 舍利弗陀羅尼經

                        XXVII 9; 卍 XI 1; Nj. 353; K. 329. Cf. 1009, 1011-1015, 1017, 1018 梁 20

T1017.note:
IKKŌ SHUSSHŌ BOSATSU KYŌ (Yi xiang chu sheng pu sa jing) 一向出生菩薩經
                        *Anantamukha[sādhaka]dhārañī 闍那崛多 she2 na3 jue2 duo1 (Jñānagupta). S. XXVII

T1018.note:
SHUSSHŌ MUHEMMON DARANI KYŌ (Chu sheng wu bian men tuo luo ni jing)
                        出生無邊門陀羅尼經 *Anantamukha[sādhaka]dhārañī 智嚴 zhi4 yan2 S. XXVII 9; 卍 XI 1; Nj.
                        360; K. 331. *Muhemmondaranikyō Cf. 1009, 1011-1017 唐 20

                        (Amoghavajra). S. XXV 8; 卍 XXVII 2.
                        *Kegongyōnyūhokkaibontonshōbirushanahosshinjiriṇyugagiki,
                        *Kegongyō[jirin]giki.

KEGONGYŌ SHINDARANI (Hua yan jing xin tuo luo ni) 華嚴經心陀羅尼 Jisshananda

                        XVII 2; Nj. 1105; Kyik., ritsu-bu XII; K. 545. *Jusaikyō. 西晉 25

T1504.note:
BOSATSU GOHŌ SANGE MON (Pu sa wu fa chan hui wen) 菩薩五法懺悔文 An. 502-557 S.
                        XV 2; 卍 XVII 2; Nj. 1102; K. 542. *Gohōsangemon. 25

T1505.note:
SHIAGOMBOSHŌGE (Si a han mu chao jie) 四阿鋡暮抄解 Basobatsuda 婆素跋陀 po2 su4 ba2
                        tuo2 (Vasubhadra); Kumarabutsudai 鳩摩羅佛提 jiu1 mo2 luo2 fo2 ti2
                        (Kumārabuddhi), etc. S. XXIV 4; 卍 XXVI 10; Nj. 1381; K. 1019. *Agomboshōkyō.
                        Cf. 1506 符秦 52

T1506.note:
SANHŌDO RON (San fa du lun) 三法度論 Sanken 山賢 (Vasubhadra); Sōgyadaiba 僧伽提婆
                        seng1 jia1 ti2 po2 (Gautama Saṃghadeva). S. XXIV 4; 卍 XXIV 7; Nj. 1271; K.
                        965. *Sanhōdokyōron. Cf. 1505 東晉 48

T1507.note:
FUMBETSU KUDOKU RON (Fen bie gong de lun) 分別功徳論 An. 25-220 S. XXIV 4; 卍
                        XXV 6; Nj. 1290; Kyik., shakkyōron-bu VIII; K. 973. *Fumbetsukudokukyō. Cf.
                        125 (1-4) 50

T1508.note:
AGON KUGE JŪNIINNEN GYŌ (A han kou jie shi er yin yuan jing) 阿含口解十二因縁經 An
                        Gen 安玄, Gombucchō 嚴佛調. S. XXIV 3; 卍 XXVI 6; Nj. 1339; K. 1023. *Agonkuge,
                        *Danjūniinnengyō. 後漢 52

T1509.note:
DAICHIDO RON (Da zhi du lun) 大智度論 Mahāprajñāpāramitopadeśa,
                        (Mahāprajñāpāramitāśāstra). Ryūju long2 shu4 (Nāgārjuna); Kumarajū 鳩摩羅什 jiu1
                        mo2 luo2 shi2 (Kumārajīva). S. XX 1-5; 卍 XIX 9-XX 4; Nj. 1169; Kyik.,
                        shakkyōron-bu I-V; K. 549. *Chidoron, *Makahannya[haramitsukyō]shakuron,
                        *Dairon. Cf. 223 後秦 25

T1510.note:
KONGŌ HANNYA RON (Jin gang ban ruo lun) 金剛般若論 Saptapadārtha? 無著 (Asaṇga)
                        [ou plutôt Vasubandhu]; Datsumagyūta 逹摩笈多 (Dharmagupta). S. XX 6; 卍 XIX 9;
                        Nj. 1167; K. 555. *Kongōhannyaharamitsukyōron. Cf. 235-239, 1511, 1513,
                        1514, 1817 隋 27

T1511.note:
KONGŌ HANNYAHARAMITSU KYŌ RON (Jin gang ban ruo bo luo mi jing lun)
                        金剛般若波羅蜜經論 *Triśatikāyā˙ p°p°yā˙ kārikāsaptati. [Asaṇga], Tenjin
                        (Vasubandhu); Bodairushi 菩提流支 pu2 ti2 liu2 zhi1 (Bodhiruci I). S. XX 6; 卍
                        XIX 9; Nj. 1168; K. 558. *Kongōhannyaron. Cf. 1510, 1512-1514, 1816, 1817 元魏
                        27

T1512.note:
KONGŌSEN RON (Jin gang xian lun) 金剛仙論 Seshin 世親 (Vasubandhu), Kongōsen
                        金剛仙 (Vajrarṣi?), Bodairushi 菩提流支 pu2 ti2 liu2 zhi1 (Bodhiruci I). Z. I II 3.
                        Cf. 1511, 1513, 1514, 1817 元魏

T1513.chinese_title: 能斷金剛般若波羅蜜多經論釋
T1513.note:
NŌDANKONGŌHANNYAHARAMITTAKYŌ RON SHAKU (Neng duan jin gang ban ruo bo luo
                        mi duo jing lun shi) 能斷金剛般若波羅蜜多經論釋 Mujaku 無著 (Asaṇga), Seshin 世親
                        (Vasubandhu); Gijō 義淨. S. XX 6; 卍 XXII 3; Nj. 1231; K. 557. *Nōdankongōkyō.
                        Cf. 1510-1512, 1514, 1817 唐 27

T1514.chinese_title: 能斷金剛般若波羅蜜多經論頌
T1514.japanese_title: NŌDAN KONGŌ HANNYAHARAMITTA KYŌ RON JU
T1514.note:
NŌDAN KONGŌ HANNYAHARAMITTA KYŌ RON JU (Neng duan jin gang ban ruo bo luo
                        mi duo jing lun song) 能斷金剛般若波羅蜜多經論頌 *Triśatikāyā˙ p°p°yā˙ kārikāsaptati.
                        Mujaku 無著 (Asaṇga); Gijō 義淨. S. XX 6; 卍 XXII 1; Nj. 1208; K. 556. Cf.
                        1511-1513, 1817 唐 27

T1515.chinese_title: 金剛般若波羅蜜經破取著不壞假名論
T1515.japanese_title: KONGŌ HANNYAHARAMITSU KYŌ HASHUJAKU FUE KEMYŌ RON
T1515.note:
KONGŌ HANNYAHARAMITSU KYŌ HASHUJAKU FUE KEMYŌ RON (Jin gang ban ruo bo
                        luo mi jing po qu zhu bu huai jia ming lun) 金剛般若波羅蜜經破取著不壞假名論 Kudokuse 功徳施
                        (Guñada?); Jibakara 地婆訶羅 di4 po2 he1 luo2 (Divākara), etc. S. XX 6; 卍 XXI 8;
                        Nj. 1192; K. 559. *Hashujakufuekemyōron, *Kudokuseron. 唐 27

T1516.chinese_title: 聖佛母般若波羅蜜多九頌精義論
T1516.japanese_title: SHŌ BUTSUMO HANNYAHARAMITTA KUJU SHŌGI RON
T1516.note:
SHŌ BUTSUMO HANNYAHARAMITTA KUJU SHŌGI RON (Sheng fo mu ban ruo bo luo mi
                        duo jiu song jing yi lun) 聖佛母般若波羅蜜多九頌精義論 *Āryāṣṭasāhasrikāyā˙ p°p°yā˙
                        piñḍārtha, Navaślokī. Shōtokushakue 勝徳赤衣 (Kambalāmbara?); Hōgo 法護, etc. S.
                        XIX 11; 卍 XXVI 1; Nj. 1313; Kyik., shakkyōron-bu VIII; K. 1478.
                        *[Butsumohannya]kujushōgiron. Cf. 224-228 宋 68

T1517.chinese_title: 佛母般若波羅蜜多圓集要義釋論
T1517.japanese_title: BUTSUMO HANNYAHARAMITTA ENSHŪ YŌGI SHAKU RON
T1517.note:
BUTSUMO HANNYAHARAMITTA ENSHŪ YŌGI SHAKU RON (Fo mu ban ruo bo luo mi duo
                        yuan ji yao yi shi lun) 佛母般若波羅蜜多圓集要義釋論
                        ±[Ārya]prajñāpāramitāsamgrahakārikāvivaraña 三寶尊 (Triratnadāsa?), Daiikiryū
                        大域龍 (Dignāga); Sego 施護, etc. S. XX 10; 卍 XXV 10; Nj. 1310; Kyik.,
                        shakkyōron-bu VIII; K. 1459. *Enshūyōgishakuron. Cf. 1518 宋 67

T1518.chinese_title: 佛母般若波羅蜜多圓集要義論
T1518.note:
BUTSUMO HANNYAHARAMITTA ENSHŪ YŌGI RON (Fo mu ban ruo bo luo mi duo yuan
                        ji yao yi lun) 佛母般若波羅蜜多圓集要義論 ±[Ārya]prajñāpāramitāsaṃgrahakārikā,
                        *P°p°piñḍārtha. Daiikiryū 大域龍 (Dignāga); Sego 施護, etc. S. XIX 11; 卍 XXV 10;
                        Nj. 1309; Kyik., shakkyōron-bu VIII; K. 1458. *[Butsumohannya]enshūyōgiron.
                        Cf. 1517 宋 67

T1519.note:
MYŌHŌRENGE KYŌ UPADAISHA (Miao fa lian hua jing you bo ti she) 妙法蓮華經憂波提舍
                        Saddharmapuñḍarīkopadeśa? 婆藪槃豆 po2 sou3 pan2 dou4 (Vasubandhu); Bodairushi
                        菩提流支 pu2 ti2 liu2 zhi1 (Bodhiruci I), Donrin 曇林, etc. S. XX 6; 卍 XXII 3; Nj.
                        1232; K. 563. *Hokekyōron, *Hokkeron. Cf. 262-264, 1520, 1818 後魏 27

T1520.chinese_title: 妙法蓮華經論優波提舍
T1520.note:
MYŌHŌRENGE KYŌ ROṄ UPADAISHA (Miao fa lian hua jing lun you bo ti she)
                        妙法蓮華經論優波提舍 Saddharmapuñḍarīkopadeśa? 婆藪槃豆 po2 sou3 pan2 dou4 (Vasubandhu);
                        Rokunamadai 勒那摩提 le4 na3 mo2 ti2 (Ratnamati), Sōrō 僧朗, etc. S. XX 6; 卍 XXII
                        3; Nj. 1233; K. 561. *Hokekyōron[den]. Cf. 262, 1519 元魏 27

T1521.note:
JŪJŪ BIBASHA RON (Shi zhu pi po sha lun) 十住毘婆沙論 Daśabhūmikavibhāṣā? 龍樹
                        long2 shu4 (Nāgārjuna); Kumarajū 鳩摩羅什 jiu1 mo2 luo2 shi2 (Kumārajīva). S.
                        XIX 8; 卍 XXI 5; Nj. 1180; Kyik., shakkyōron-bu VII; K. 584. *Jūjūron. Cf.
                        278 (22), 279 (26), 285, 286 後秦 29

T1522.note:
JŪJI KYŌ RON (Shi di jing lun) 十地經論 Daśabhūmikasūtraśāstra?
                        ±Daśabhūmivyākhyāna. Tenjin (Vasubandhu); Bodairushi 菩提流支 pu2 ti2 liu2 zhi1
                        (Bodhiruci I). S. XIX 9; 卍 XXI 9; Nj. 1194; Kyik., shakkyōron-bu VI; K. 550.
                        *Jūjiron. Cf. 278 (22), 279 (26), 285, 286, 2758, 2799 後魏 26

T1523.note:
DAIHŌSHAKKYŌ RON (Da bao ji jing lun) 大寶積經論 Ratnakūṭasūtraśāstra? 菩提流支
                        pu2 ti2 liu2 zhi1 (Bodhiruci I). S. XIX 10; 卍 XXII 3; Nj. 1234; K. 552.
                        *Hōshakkyōron. Cf. 310 (43) 後魏 26

T1524.chinese_title: 無量壽經優波提舍願生偈
T1524.note:
MURYŌJU KYŌ UPADAISHA GANSHŌ GE (Wu liang shou jing you bo ti she yuan
                        sheng jie) 無量壽經優波提舍願生偈 Sukhāvativyūhopadeśa? 婆藪槃豆 po2 sou3 pan2 dou4
                        (Vasubandhu); Bodairushi 菩提流支 pu2 ti2 liu2 zhi1 (Bodhiruci I). S. XIX 11; 卍
                        XXII 1; Nj. 1204; K. 565. *Muryōjukyōron, *Jōdoron, *Ōjōron. Cf. 310 (5),
                        360-363, 1819 元魏 27

T1525.note:
MIROKUBOSATSU SHOMON GYŌ RON (Mi le pu sa suo wen jing lun) 彌勒菩薩所問經論
                        Maitreyaparipṛcchopadeśa? 菩提流支 pu2 ti2 liu2 zhi1 (Bodhiruci I). S. XIX 10; 卍
                        XXII 1; Nj. 1203; Kyik., shakkyōron-bu VIII; K. 551. *Mirokumongyōron. Cf.
                        310 (41), 348 後魏 26

T1526.note:
HŌKEI KYŌ SHIHŌ UPADAISHA (Bao ji jing si fa you bo ti she) 寶髻經四法憂波提舍
                        Tenjin 天親 (Vasubandhu); Bimokuchisen 毘目智仙 pi2 mu4 zhi4 xian1
                        (Vimokṣaprajñarṣi?). S. XIX 11; 卍 XXII 4; Nj. 1241; Kyik., shakkyōron-bu
                        VIII; K. 553. Cf. 310 (47) 元魏 26

T1528.japanese_title: NEHAN GYŌ HONNU KOMMU GE RON
T1528.note:
NEHAN GYŌ HONNU KOMMU GE RON (Nie pan jing ben you jin wu jie lun)
                        涅槃經本有今無偈論 Tenjin 天親 (Vasubandhu); Shindai 眞諦 (Paramārtha). S. XX 6; 卍 XXII
                        1; Nj. 1207; Kyik., shakkyōron-bu VIII; K. 566. *Honnukommugeron. 陳 27

T1529.note:
YUIKYŌ GYŌ RON (Yi jiao jing lun) 遺教經論 (Apocryphe ch. attribué à) Tenjin
                        天親 (Vasubandhu); (et à) Shindai 眞諦 (Paramārtha). S. XX 6; 卍 XXII 1; Nj.
                        1209; K. 564. *Yuikyōron. Cf. 389, 1820 陳 27

T1530.note:
BUTSUJI KYŌ RON (Fo di jing lun) 佛地經論 Buddhabhūmiśāstra? 親光
                        (Bandhuprabha), etc.; Genjō 玄奘. S. XIX 11; 卍 XXI 9; Nj. 1195; K. 554.
                        *Butsujiron. Cf. 680 唐 27

T1531.chinese_title: 文殊師利菩薩問菩提經論
T1531.note:
MONJUSHIRIBOSATSU MOM BODAI KYŌ RON (Wen shu shi li pu sa wen pu ti jing
                        lun) 文殊師利菩薩問菩提經論 ±Gayāśīrṣasūtraṭīkā 天親 (Vasubandhu); Bodairushi 菩提流支 pu2
                        ti2 liu2 zhi1 (Bodhiruci I). S. XIX 11; 卍 XXI 8; Nj. 1191; K. 560.
                        *Gayasanchōgyōron. Cf. 464-467 元魏 27

T1532.note:
SHŌSHIYUI BONTEN SHOMON GYŌ RON (Sheng si wei fan tian suo wen jing lun)
                        勝思惟梵天所問經論 Viśeṣacintibrahmaparipṛcchāśāstra? 天親 (Vasubandhu); Bodairushi
                        菩提流支 pu2 ti2 liu2 zhi1 (Bodhiruci I). S. XIX 11; 卍 XXI 8; Nj. 1193; K. 562.
                        *Shōshiyuimongyōron. Cf. 586, 587 後魏 27

T1533.note:
TEMBŌRIN GYŌ UPADAISHA (Zhuan fa lun jing you bo ti she) 轉法輪經憂波提舍 Tenjin
                        天親 (Vasubandhu); Bimokuchisen 毘目智仙 pi2 mu4 zhi4 xian1 (Vimokṣaprajñarṣi?).
                        S. XIX 11; 卍 XXII 1; Nj. 1205; Kyik., shakkyōron-bu VIII; K. 569.
                        *Tembōringyōron. 元魏 27

T1534.note:
SANGUSOKU KYŌ UPADAISHA (San ju zu jing you bo ti she) 三具足經憂波提舍 Tenjin 天親
                        (Vasubandhu); Bimokuchisen 毘目智仙 pi2 mu4 zhi4 xian1 (Vimokṣaprajñarṣi?). S.
                        XIX 11; 卍 XXI 9; Nj. 1196; Kyik., shakkyōron-bu VIII; K. 568 元魏 27

T1535.note:
DAIJŌ SHIHŌ KYŌ SHAKU (Da cheng si fa jing shi) 大乘四法經釋
                        Caturdharmakasūtravyākhyāna? 天親 (Vasubandhu); Hōjō (?) 法成]. TH St. 609; G.
                        5650. Cf. 2784, 2785

T1537.note:
ABIDATSUMA HŌUNSOKU RON (A pi da mo fa yun zu lun) 阿毘逹磨法蘊足論
                        [Abhidharma]dharmaskandha[pādaśāstra] 大目乾連 (Mahāmaudgalyāyana); Genjō 玄奘. S.
                        XXI 4; 卍 XXV 8; Nj. 1296; Kyik., bidon-bu III; K. 945. *Hōunsokuron. 唐 43

T1539.note:
ABIDATSUMA SHIKISHINSOKU RON (A pi da mo shi juan/shen zu lun) 阿毘逹磨識身足論
                        [Abhidharma]vijñānakāya[pādaśāstra] 提婆設摩 (Devaśarman?); Genjō 玄奘. S. XXIII
                        9; 卍 XXV 3-4; Nj. 1281; Kyik., bidon-bu IV; K. 947. *Shikishin[soku]ron. 唐
                        43

T1540.note:
ABIDATSUMA KAISHINSOKU RON (A pi da mo jie juan/shen zu lun) 阿毘逹磨界身足論
                        [Abhidharma]dhātukāya[pādaśāstra] 世友 (Vasumitra); Genjō 玄奘. S. XXIII 10; 卍
                        XXV 4; Nj. 1282; Kyik., bidon-bu V; K. 948. *Kaishin[soku]ron. 唐 43

T1541.note:
SHŪJIBUṄ ABIDON RON (Zhong shi fen a pi tan lun) 衆事分阿毘曇論
                        [Abhidharma]prakarañapāda[śāstra] 世友 (Vasumitra); Gunabatsudara 求那跋陀羅 qiu2
                        na3 ba2 tuo2 luo2 (Guñabhadra), Bodaiyasha 菩提耶舍 pu2 ti2 ye1 she4
                        (Bodhiyaśas). S. XXIII 11; 卍 XXV 6-7; Nj. 1292; K. 950. *Shūjibidon. Cf.
                        1542, 1555-1557 劉宋 44

T1542.note:
ABIDATSUMA HONRUISOKU RON (A pi da mo pin lei zu lun) 阿毘逹磨品類足論
                        [Abhidharma]prakarañapāda[śāstra] 世友 (Vasumitra); Genjō 玄奘. S. XXIII 10; 卍
                        XXV 1-2; Nj. 1277; Kyik., bidon-bu V; K. 949. *Honruisokuron. Cf. 1541 唐 44

T1543.note:
ABIDON HAKKENDO RON (A pi tan ba jian du lun) 阿毘曇八犍度論
                        [Abhidharma]jñanaprasthāna[śāstra], Abhidharmāṣṭaskandhaśāstra. Kasennenshi
                        迦旃延子 (Kātyāyanīputra); Sōgyadaiba 僧伽提婆 seng1 jia1 ti2 po2 (Gautama
                        Saṃghadeva), Jiku Butsunen 竺佛念. S. XXI 6; 卍 XXIV 7-8; Nj. 1273; Kyik.,
                        bidon-bu XVII-XVIII; K. 943. *Hakkendoron, *Abidonhakkendo, *Abidongyō,
                        *Kasenneṇabidon. Cf. 1544, 1545 符秦 43

T1544.note:
ABIDATSUMA HOCCHI RON (A pi da mo fa zhi lun) 阿毘逹磨發智論
                        [Abhidharma]jñānaprasthāna[śāstra] 迦多衍尼子 jia1 duo1 yan3 ni2 zi3
                        (Kātyāyanīputra); Genjō 玄奘. S. XXI 5; 卍 XXIV 10; Nj. 1275; K. 944.
                        *Hocchiron. Cf. 1543, 1545 唐 43

T1545.note:
ABIDATSUMA DAIBIBASHA RON (A pi da mo da pi po sha lun) 阿毘逹磨大毘婆沙論
                        [Abhidharma]mahāvibhāṣā[śāstra]? 卍 XXII 6-XXIII 3; Nj. 1263; Kyik., bidon-bu
                        VII-XVIII; K. 952. *[Daibi]basha. Cf. 1543, 1544, 1546, 1547 唐 45

T1546.note:
ABIDOM BIBASHA RON (A pi tan pi po sha lun) 阿毘曇毘婆沙論
                        [Abhidharma]vibhāṣā[śāstra]? 迦旃延子 (Kātyāyanīputra), Gohyakuarakan 五百阿羅漢 (500
                        Arhat); Fudabatsuma 浮陀跋摩 fu2 tuo2 ba2 mo2 (Buddhavarman), Dōtai 道泰, etc. S.
                        XXI 7-10; 卍 XXIII 4-7; Nj. 1264; K. 951. *Bibasharon. Cf. 1543-1545, 1547 北涼
                        44

T1547.note:
BIBASHA RON (Bing po sha lun) E婆沙論 Vibhāṣā[śāstra]? 尸陀槃尼 shi1 tuo2 pan2
                        ni2 (Sitapāñi?), var. Kasennenshi 迦旃延子 (Kātyāyanīputra); Sōgyabacchō 僧伽跋澄
                        seng1 jia1 ba2 cheng2 (Saṃghabhadra?). S. XXII 9; 卍 XXV 2-3; Nj. 1279; K.
                        971. *Bibashaabidonron. Cf. 1543-1546 符秦 49

T1548.note:
SHARIHOTSU ABIDON RON (She li fu a pi tan lun) 舍利弗阿毘曇論
                        Śāriputrābhidharma[śāstra]? 曇摩耶舍 tan2 mo2 ye1 she4 (Dharmayaśas), Dommakutta
                        曇摩崛多 tan2 mo2 jue2 duo1 (Dharmagupta), etc. S. XXI 2-3; 卍 XXIV 4-5; Nj.
                        1268; Kyik., bidon-bu XIX-XXII; K. 969. *Sharihotsubidon. 姚秦 49

T1549.note:
SOM BASUMITSU BOSATSU SHOSHŪ RON (Zun po xu mi pu sa suo ji lun)
                        尊婆須蜜菩薩所集論 Basumitsu 婆須蜜 (Vasumitra); Sōgyabacchō 僧伽跋澄 seng1 jia1 ba2 cheng2
                        (Saṃghabhadra?), etc. S. XXIV 1; 卍 XXV 5-6; Nj. 1289; Kyik., bidon-bu VI; K.
                        963. *Basumitsu[bosatsu]shoshūron, *Basumitsukyō. 符秦 48

T1550.note:
ABIDONSHIN RON (A pi tan xin lun) 阿毘曇心論 Abhidharmahṛdaya[śāstra]? 法勝 fa3
                        sheng4 (Dharmaśrī?); Sōgyadaiba 僧伽提婆 seng1 jia1 ti2 po2 (Gautama
                        Saṃghadeva), Eon 慧遠, etc. S. XXIII 11; 卍 XXV 5; Nj. 1288; Kyik., bidon-bu
                        XXI; K. 959. *Abidonshin. Cf. 1551, 1552 晉 48

T1551.note:
ABIDONSHIN RON KYŌ (A pi tan xin lun jing) 阿毘曇心論經 Abhidharmahṛdaya 優波扇多
                        you1 bo1 shan4 duo1 (Upaśānta); Narendaiyasha 那連提耶舍 na3 lian2 ti2 ye1 she4
                        (Narendrayaśas). S. XXIII 11-12; 卍 XXV 7-8; Nj. 1294; Kyik., bidon-bu XXI;
                        K. 958. *Hosshōabidonshinron, *Hosshōbidon. Cf. 1550, 1552 高齊 48

T1552.note:
ZŌ ABIDONSHIN RON (Za a pi tan xin lun) 雜阿毘曇心論
                        Saṃyuktābhidarmahṛdaya[śāstra]? 法救 fa3 jiu4 (Dharmatrāta); Sōgyabatsuma 僧伽跋摩
                        seng1 jia1 ba2 mo2 (Saṃghavarman), etc. S. XXIII 12; 卍 XXV 4-5; Nj. 1287;
                        Kyik., bidon-bu XX-XXI; K. 960. *Zōabidongyō, *Zōabidombasha, *Zōshinron.
                        Cf. 1550, 1551 劉宋 48

T1553.note:
ABIDON KANROMI RON (A pi tan gan lu wei lun) 阿毘曇甘露味論
                        Abhidharmāmṛtarasaśāstra 瞿沙 (Ghoṣaka); An. 220-265. S. XXIV 1; 卍 XXV 2; Nj.
                        1278; Kyik., ronjū-bu II; K. 961. *Kanromiron, *Kanromikyō, *Kanromiabidon.
                        48

T1554.note:
NYŪ ABIDATSUMA RON (Ru a pi da mo lun) 入阿毘逹磨論 Prakarañābhidharmāvatāra,
                        ±Abhidharmāvatāraśāstra. Sokkendara 塞建陀羅 (Skandhila); Genjō 玄奘. S. XXIV 1; 卍
                        XXV 6; Nj. 1291; Kyik., ronjū-bu II; K. 964 唐 48

T1555.note:
GOJI BIBASHA RON (Wu shi pi po sha lun) 五事毘婆沙論 Pañcavastukavibhāṣāśāstra?
                        法救 fa3 jiu4 (Dharmatrāta); Genjō 玄奘. S. XXIV 1; 卍 XXV 4; Nj. 1283; K. 970.
                        *Gojiron. Cf. 1556, 1557, 1541 唐 49

T1556.note:
SAPPATASHŪ GOJI RON (Sa po duo zong wu shi lun) 薩婆多宗五事論 Hōjō 法成 fa3
                        cheng2 TH P. 2116. Cf. 1555 唐

T1557.note:
ABIDON GOHŌGYŌ KYŌ (A pi tan wu fa xing jing) 阿毘曇五法行經 An Seikō 安世高. S.
                        XXIV 1; 卍 XXVI 7; Nj. 1346; K. 1026. *Abidonkuekyō. 後漢 52

ABIDATSUMA KUSHA RON (A pi da mo ju she lun) 阿毘逹磨倶舍論 *A°k°bhāṣya;
                        Abhidharmakośaśāstra? Seshin 世親 (Vasubandhu); Genjō 玄奘. S. XXII 9-10; 卍 XXIV
                        2-3; Nj. 1267; Kyik., bidon-bu XXV-XXVI B; K. 955. *Kusharon. Cf. 1559-1561,
                        1821-1823, 2249-2252 唐 47

T1559.note:
ABIDATSUMA KUSHA SHAKU RON (A pi da mo ju she shi lun) 阿毘逹磨倶舍釋論
                        *A°k°bhāṣya; Abhidharmakośaśāstra? Basobanzu po2 sou3 pan2 dou4
                        (Vasubandhu); Shindai 眞諦 (Paramārtha). S. XXIII 1-2; 卍 XXIV 5-6; Nj. 1269;
                        K. 953. *Kushashakuron. Cf. 1558, 1560, 1561 陳 46

T1560.note:
ABIDATSUMA KUSHA RON HONJU (A pi da mo ju she lun ben song) 阿毘逹磨倶舍論本頌
                        *Abhidharmakośakārikā 世親 (Vasubandhu); Genjō 玄奘. S. XXIII 2; 卍 XXIV 7; Nj.
                        1270; K. 954. Cf. 1558, 1559, 1561, 1823 唐 46

T1561.note:
KUSHARON JITSUGI SHO (Ju she lun shi yi shu) 倶舍論實義疏 Tattvārthaṭīkā? 安慧
                        (Sthiramati). TH. P. 3196. Cf. 1558-1560, 1641

T1562.note:
ABIDATSUMA JUNSHŌRI RON (A pi da mo shun zheng li lun) 阿毘逹磨順正理論

                        3-6; 卍 XXIII 7-10; Nj. 1265; Kyik., bidon-bu XXVII-XXX; K. 956.
                        *Junshōriron, *Kushabakuron. 唐 47

T1563.note:
ABIDATSUMA ZŌ KENSHŪ RON (A pi da mo zang xian zong lun) 阿毘逹磨藏顯宗論
                        Abhidharmapiṭakaprakarañaśāsanaśāstra? 衆賢 (Saṃghabhadra); Genjō 玄奘. S. XXIII
                        7-8; 卍 XXIV 1-2; Nj. 1266; Kyik., bidon-bu XXIII-XXIV; K. 957. *Kenshūron. 唐
                        48

T1565.note:
JUNCHŪ RON (Shun zhong lun) 順中論 Ryūju 龍樹 long2 shu4 (Nāgārjuna), Mujaku
                        無著 (Asaṇga); Kudon Hannyarushi 瞿曇般若流支 qu2 tan2 ban1 zang4 liu2 zhi1 (Gautama
                        Prajñāruci) S. XIX 2; 卍 XXII 4; Nj. 1246; K. 589.
                        *Junchūronginyūdaihannyaharamitsukyōshobonhōmon. Cf. 1564, 1566, 1567 元魏 29

T1566.note:
HANNYA TŌ RON SHAKU (Pan ruo deng lun shi) 般若燈論釋
                        ±Prajñāpradīpamūlamadhyamakavṛtti 龍樹 long2 shu4 (Nāgārjuna), Fumbetsumyō 分別明
                        (Bhāviveka); Harahamittara 波羅頗蜜多羅 bo1 luo2 po3 mi4 duo1 luo2
                        (Prabhākaramitra). S. XIX 1; 卍 XXI 7; Nj. 1185; Kyik., chūgan-bu II; K. 578.
                        *Hannyatōron. Cf. 1564, 1565, 1567 唐 28

T1568.note:
JŪNIMON RON (Shi er men lun) 十二門論 Dvādaśanikāyaśāstra? 龍樹 long2 shu4
                        (Nāgārjuna); Kumarajū 鳩摩羅什 jiu1 mo2 luo2 shi2 (Kumārajīva). S. XVIII 10; 卍
                        XXI 7; Nj. 1186; Kyik., chūgan-bu I; K. 579. Cf. 1825, 1826 姚秦 29

T1571.note:
DAIJŌ KŌHYAKURON SHAKU RON (Da cheng guang bai lun shi lun) 大乘廣百論釋論
                        Shōten 聖天 (Ārya Deva), Gohō 護法 (Dharmapāla); Genjō 玄奘. S. XX 10; 卍 XXI 10;
                        Nj. 1198; Kyik., chūgan-bu III; K. 583. *Kōhyakuron[shakuron]. Cf. 1569,
                        1570, 2800 唐 29

T1573.note:
ICHI SHUROKA RON (Yi shu lu jia lun) 壹輸盧迦論 Ekaślokaśāstra? 龍樹 long2 shu4
                        (Nāgārjuna); Kudon Hannyarushi 瞿曇般若流支 qu2 tan2 ban1 zang4 liu2 zhi1 (Gautama
                        Prajñāruci). S. XIX 1; 卍 XXII 2; Nj. 1212; Kyik., chūgan-bu III; K. 632.
                        *Ikashurokaron.

T1574.note:
DAIJŌ HAU RON (Da cheng po you lun) 大乘破有論 Pratītyasamutpādahṛdayakārikā,
                        Bhavasaṃkrānti. Ryūju 龍樹 long2 shu4 (Nāgārjuna); Sego 施護. S. XIX 1; 卍 XXV
                        10; Nj. 1305; Kyik., chūgan-bu III; K. 1433. *Hauron. 宋 67

T1575.note:
ROKUJŪJU NYORI RON (Liu shi song ru li lun) 六十頌如理論 ±Yuktiṣaṣtikākārikā 龍樹
                        long2 shu4 (Nāgārjuna); Sego 施護. S. XIX 1; 卍 XXV 10; Nj. 1307; Kyik.,
                        chūgan-bu III; K. 1441. *Nyoriron. 宋 67

T1577.note:
DAIJŌBU RON (Da zhang fu lun) 大丈夫論 Mahāpurusaśāstra? 提婆羅 ([Ārya] Deva);
                        Dōtai 道泰. S. XIX 5; 卍 XXII 4; Nj. 1242; Kyik., chūgan-bu III; K. 615 北涼 30

T1578.note:
DAIJŌ SHŌCHIN RON (Da cheng zhang zhen lun) 大乘掌珍論 Hastamañi? 清辯 (Bhavya,
                        Bhā[va]viveka); Genjō 玄奘. S. XIX 5; 卍 XXII 4; Nj. 1237; Kyik., chūgan-bu
                        III; K. 620. *Shōchinron, *Shōchūron. 唐 30

T1579.note:
YUGASHIJI RON (Yu qie shi di lun) 瑜伽師地論 ±Yogacār[y]abhūmiśāstra 彌勒
                        (Maitreya); Genjō 玄奘. S. XVIII 1-5; 卍 XX 5-9; Nj. 1170; Kyik., yuga-bu I-VI;

T1581.note:
BOSATSUJIJI KYŌ (Pu sa di chi jing) 菩薩地持經 *Bodhisattvabhūmi 曇無讖 tan2 wu2
                        chen4 S. XVIII 6; 卍 XVII 1; Nj. 1086; K. 523. *Jijiron, *Jijikyō,
                        *Bosatsujikyō, *Bosatsukaikyō. Cf. 1579 (I, 15), 1582, 2803 北涼 24

T1582.note:
BOSATSU ZENKAI KYŌ (Pu sa shan jie jing) 菩薩善戒經 *Bodhisattvabhūmi 求那跋摩
                        qiu2 na3 ba2 mo2 (Guñavarman). S. XV 1; 卍 XVII 1; Nj. 1085; K. 524.
                        *[Bosatsuji]zenkaikyō. Cf. 1579 (I, 15), 1581 劉宋 24

T1583.note:
BOSATSU ZENKAI KYŌ (Pu sa shan jie jing) 菩薩善戒經 Bodhisattvacaryanirdeśa
                        求那跋摩 qiu2 na3 ba2 mo2 (Guñavarman). S. XV 1; 卍 XVII 1; Nj. 1085; K. 532.
                        *Uparimombosatsujukaihō, *[Bosatsuji]zenkaikyō. Cf. 1499-1501, 1579 (I, 15),
                        1581 (10), 1582 (11) 劉宋 24

T1584.note:
KETSUJŌ ZŌ RON (Jue ding zang lun) 決定藏論 Shindai 眞諦 (Paramārtha). S. XVIII

T1585.note:
JŌ YUISHIKI RON (Cheng wei shi lun) 成唯識論 Vijñaptimātratāsiddhi[śāstra] ?

                        yoga-bu VII; K. 614. *Yuishikiron. Cf. 1586, 1587, 1830-1833, 2262-2267,

                        S. XVIII 9; 卍 XXII 2; Nj. 1215; K. 609. *Sanjūron. Cf. 1585, 1587, 2268,

T1587.note:
TENJIKI RON (Zhuan shi lun) 轉識論 Pravṛttivijñānaśāstra (?). Shindai
                        (Paramārtha). S. XVIII 10; 卍 XXII 2; Nj. 1214; Kyik., yuga-bu XII; K. 612.
                        Cf. 1585, 1586 陳 30

T1588.note:
YUISHIKI RON (Wei lun lun) 唯論論 *Viṃśatikā[kārikā,
                        °vijñaptimātratāsiddhi]; ±Viṃśakā[kārikā]. Tenjin 天親 (Vasubandhu); Kudon
                        Hannyarushi 瞿曇般若流支 qu2 tan2 ban1 zang4 liu2 zhi1 (Gautama Prajñāruci). S.
                        XVIII 9; 卍 XXII 4; Nj. 1238; K. 613. *Ryōgayuishikiron,
                        *[Daijō]ryōgakyōyuishikiron, *Hashikishinron, *Yuishikimukyōron. Cf. 671,
                        1589-1561 後魏 30

T1589.note:
DAIJŌ YUISHIKI RON (Da cheng wei shi lun) 大乘唯識論 *Viṃśatikā[kārikā,
                        °vijñaptimātratāsiddhi]; ±Viṃśaka[kārikā]. Tenjin (Vasubandhu); Shindai 眞諦
                        (Paramārtha). S. XVIII 9; 卍 XXII 4; Nj. 1239; K. 610.
                        *Yuishiki[mukyōgai]ron. Cf. 1588, 1590, 1591 陳 30

T1590.note:
YUISHIKI NIJŪ RON (Wei shi er shi lun) 唯識二十論 *Viṃśatikā[kārikā,
                        °vijñaptimātratāsiddhi]; ±Viṃśaka[kārikā]. Seshin 世親 (Vasubandhu); Genjō 玄奘.
                        S. XVIII 9; 卍 XXII 4; Nj. 1240; Kyik., yuga-bu VII; K. 608. Cf. 1588, 1589,

JŌYUISHIKI HŌSHŌ RON (Cheng wei shi bao sheng lun) 成唯識寶生論 Gohō 護法

SHŌ DAIJŌ RON (She da cheng lun) 攝大乘論 ±Mahāyānasaṃgraha 阿僧伽 a1 seng1 jia1

SHŌ DAIJŌ RON HAN (She da cheng lun ben) 攝大乘論本 ±Mahāyānasaṃgraha 無著

                        Kyik., yuga-bu IX; K. 590. *Shindaishōron, *Ryōshōron. Cf. 1592-1594,

T1596.note:
SHŌDAIJŌRON SHAKU RON (She da cheng lun shi lun) 攝大乘論釋論
                        ±Mahāyānasaṃgrahabhāṣya 世親 (Vasubandhu); Datsumagyūta 達磨笈多 da2 mo2 ji2 duo1
                        (Dharmagupta), Gyōku 行矩, etc. S. XX 9; 卍 XXI 1-2; Nj. 1171 (c); K. 593.
                        *Seshinshōron. Cf. 1592-1595, 1597, 1598 隋 30

T1599.note:
CHŪBEN FUMBETSU RON (Zhong bian fen bie lun) 中邊分別論 ±Madhyāntavibhaṇgaṭīkā

T1600.note:
BEN CHŪBEN RON (Bian zhong bian lun) 辯中邊論 ±Madhyāntavibhaṇga (ou
                        *vibhāga) ṭīkā. Seshin (Vasubandhu); Genjō 玄奘. S. XVIII 9; 卍 XXII 4; Nj.
                        1244; Kyik., yuga-bu XII; K. 601. *Chūbenron, *Benchūbenfumbetsuron. Cf.

T1601.note:
BEN CHŪBEN RON JU (Bian zhong bian lun song) 辯中邊論頌 ±Madhyāntavibhaṇga (ou
                        *vibhāga) kārikā. Miroku 彌勒 (Maitreya); Genjō 玄奘. S. XVIII 9; 卍 XXII 4; Nj.
                        1245; K. 599. *Chūbenju. Cf. 1599, 1600 唐 30

T1602.note:
KENYŌ SHŌGYŌ RON (Xian yang sheng jiao lun) 顯揚聖教論 Āryaśāsanaprakaraña? 無著
                        (Asaṇga); Genjō 玄奘. S. XVIII 7; 卍 XXI 3; Nj. 1177; K. 571. Cf. 1579, 1603,
                        1617 唐 28

T1603.note:
KENYŌ SHŌGYŌ RON JU (Xian yang sheng jiao lun song) 顯揚聖教論頌 Mujaku 無著
                        (Asaṇga); Genjō 玄奘. S. XVIII 7; 卍 XXII 1; Nj. 1202; K. 573. Cf. 1602 唐 28

T1604.note:
DAIJŌ SHŌGON GYŌ RON (Da cheng zhuang yan jing lun) 大乘莊嚴經論
                        *Mahāyānasūtrālaṃkāra 無著 (Asaṇga); Harahamittara 波羅頗蜜多羅 bo1 luo2 po3 mi4
                        duo1 luo2 (Prabhākaramitra). S. XIX 4; 卍 XXI 8; Nj. 1190; Kyik., yuga-bu
                        XII; K. 586. *Shōgongyōron, *Daijōshōgonron. 唐 29

T1606.note:
DAIJŌ ABIDATSUMA ZŌJŪ RON (Da cheng a pi da mo za ji lun) 大乘阿毘逹磨雜集論
                        ±Abhidharmasamuccayavyākhyā 安慧 (Sthiramati); Genjō 玄奘. S. XVIII 8; 卍 XXI 4;
                        Nj. 1178; Kyik., yuga-bu X; K. 576. *[Abidatsuma]zōjūron, *Taibōron. Cf.
                        1605 唐 28

T1607.note:
ROKUMON KYŌJU SHŪJŌ RON (Liu men jiao shou xi ding lun) 六門教授習定論 Mujaku 無著
                        (Asaṇga), Tenjin 天親 (Vasubandhu); Gijō 義淨. S. XIX 3; 卍 XXII 3; Nj. 1230; K.
                        633. *Shūjōron. 唐 30

T1608.note:
GŌ JŌJU RON (Ye cheng jiu lun) 業成就論 ±Karmasiddhiprakaraña 天親
                        (Vasubandhu); Bimokuchisen 毘目智仙 pi2 mu4 zhi4 xian1 (Vimokṣaprajñarṣi?). S.
                        XVIII 9; 卍 XXII 2; Nj. 1222; K. 602. Cf. 1609 元魏 30

T1610.note:
BUSSHŌ RON (Fo xing lun) 佛性論 Buddhatvaśāstra? 天親 (Vasubandhu); Shindai 眞諦
                        (Paramārtha). S. XIX 2; 卍 XXII 2; Nj. 1220; Kyik., ronjū-bu II; K. 596 陳 30

T1611.note:
KUKYŌ ICHIJŌ HŌSHŌ RON (Jiu jing yi cheng bao xing lun) 究竟一乘寶性論
                        ±Mahāyānottaratantraśāstra; *Ratnagotravibhāgamahāyānottaratantraśāstra;
                        Ratnagotravibhāgaśāstra; Ratnagotravibhāgamahāyānottaratantraśātra. [Kenne
                        (Sāramati) ]; Rokunamadai 勒那摩提 le4 na3 mo2 ti2 (Ratnamati). S. XIX 2; 卍 XXII
                        4; Nj. 1236; K. 600. *Hōshō[fumbetsushichijōzōjō]ron, *Ichijōhōshōron. 後魏 30

T1612.note:
DAIJŌ GOUN RON (Da cheng wu yun lun) 大乘五蘊論 ±Pañcaskandhaprakaraña 世親
                        (Vasubandhu); Genjō 玄奘. S. XVIII 9; 卍 XXI 2; Nj. 1176; K. 619. *Gounron. Cf.
                        1613 唐 30

T1613.note:
DAIJŌ KŌ GOUN RON (Da cheng guang wu yun lun) 大乘廣五蘊論
                        ±Pañcaskandhaprakarañavaibhāṣya 安慧 (Sthiramati); Jibakara 地婆訶羅 di4 po2 he1
                        luo2 (Divākara). S. XX 10; 卍 XXI 2; Nj. 1175; K. 618. *Kōgounron,
                        *Daijōgounron. Cf. 1612 唐 30

T1614.note:
DAIJŌ HYAPPŌ MYŌMON RON (Da cheng bai fa ming men lun) 大乘百法明門論
                        ±Mahāyānaśatadharmaprakāśamukhaśāstra 天親 (Vasubandhu); Genjō 玄奘. S. XVIII
                        10; 卍 XXII 2; Nj. 1213; K. 644. *Hyappō [myōmon] ron. Cf. 1836, 1837, 2810 唐
                        30

T1615.note:
ŌBŌ SHŌRI RON (Wang fa zheng li lun) 王法正理論 Miroku 彌勒 (Maitreya); Genjō
                        玄奘. S. XVIII 6; 卍 XXII 1; Nj. 1200; K. 574. Cf. 1579 (II, 2), 524 陳 28

T1616.note:
JŪHACHIKŪ RON (Shi ba kong lun) 十八空論 Aṣṭādaśāśūnyatāśāstra? 龍樹 long2 shu4
                        (Nāgārjuna), Shindai 眞諦 (Paramārtha). S. XIX 2; 卍 XXI 7; Nj. 1187; Kyik.,
                        yuga-bu XII; K. 580. Cf. 1600 陳 29

T1617.note:
SAMMUSHŌ RON (San wu xing lun) 三無性論 Shindai 眞諦 (Paramārtha). S. XVIII 10;
                        卍 XXII 2; Nj. 1219; Kyik., yuga-bu XII; K. 622. Cf. 1602, 1603 陳 30

T1618.note:
KENSHIKI RON (Xian shi lun) 顯識論 Shindai 眞諦 (Paramārtha). S. XVIII 10; 卍
                        XXII 2; Nj. 1217; Kyik., yuga-bu XII; K. 611. *Kenjikihon. 陳 30

T1619.note:
MUSŌ SHIJIN RON (Wu xiang si chen lun) 無相思塵論 ±Ālambanaparīkṣā 陳那

T1620.note:
GEKEN RON (Jie juan lun) 解捲論 ±Hastavālaprakaraña 陳那 (Dignāga); Shindai 眞諦

T1621.note:
SHŌCHŪ RON (Zhang zhong lun) 掌中論 ±Hastavālaprakaraña 陳那 (Dignāga); Gijō
